title: Brute Force / Password Spray
description: Detects brute force / password spray attacks via repeated Windows failed logon events (EventID 4625) from the same source.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, COUNT(*) AS hits FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4625%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND username NOT ILIKE '%$' GROUP BY sourceip HAVING COUNT(*) >= 15 ORDER BY hits DESC LAST 10 MINUTES
